items.title: Tiny CUDA language model playground
items.oneliner: Minimal CUDA LLM you can read end-to-end, modify kernels, and benchmark on your own GPU today.

items.title: Zero-copy Transit serializer in C
items.oneliner: C11 Transit reader and writer uses zero-copy parsing and SIMD to replace slower JSON pipelines.

items.title: Use Zig allocators from C
items.oneliner: Drop-in allocator bridge lets C projects replace malloc and free with Zig allocators.

items.title: Learn Zig through runnable examples
items.oneliner: Hands-on Zig examples cover core syntax, errors, and data structures without forcing you through abstract docs.

items.title: Rust Pico 2 embedded examples
items.oneliner: Runnable Embassy examples show Rust on Raspberry Pi Pico 2 with sensors, displays, Wi-Fi, and Matter.

items.title: LLM study tool for new domains
items.oneliner: Open-source learning app uses LLMs to quiz, explain, and deepen understanding instead of skipping the hard parts.

items.title: Build a perceptron from scratch
items.oneliner: Step-by-step Python tutorial implements a perceptron from first principles with browser demos you can inspect live.

items.title: Go amd64 tuning benchmark guide
items.oneliner: Benchmark-driven walkthrough shows when GOAMD64 recompiles actually speed up Go workloads on modern x86 CPUs.

items.title: Reliable Linux mount watching technique
items.oneliner: Deep systems walkthrough shows how to verify /proc and combine it with inotify for safer mount detection.

items.title: Datasette database editing plugin release
items.oneliner: Early Datasette plugin adds agent-assisted database editing and is ready to inspect, install, and extend.
